name: Oil & Gas Pipeline SCADA Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of pipeline SCADA systems to manipulate pressure, flow, and valve controls via exposed RTUs and satellite communications
root_objective: Compromise pipeline SCADA to manipulate pressure and flow controls

nodes.title: Manipulate Pipeline Pressure and Flow
nodes.description: Gain control of pipeline SCADA to alter pressure setpoints, valve positions, or flow rates causing disruption or physical damage

nodes.title: Compromise Pipeline Control Centre
nodes.description: Gain access to the central pipeline control room network

nodes.title: Exploit Exposed Citrix/RDP Gateway
nodes.description: Compromise internet-facing remote access used by pipeline operators for after-hours monitoring

nodes.title: Compromise Third-Party SCADA Vendor
nodes.description: Infiltrate via a third-party vendor with VPN access for remote maintenance of SCADA systems

nodes.title: Access Remote Pipeline RTUs
nodes.description: Communicate directly with Remote Terminal Units at remote pipeline stations

nodes.title: Intercept Satellite/Radio Communications
nodes.description: Exploit unencrypted VSAT or radio telemetry links used between control centre and remote RTUs

nodes.title: Exploit Unauthenticated DNP3/Modbus
nodes.description: Send commands via industrial protocols that lack authentication to remote field devices

nodes.title: Manipulate Valve and Compressor Controls
nodes.description: Issue commands to close/open valves or alter compressor station settings

nodes.title: Force-Close Emergency Shutdown Valve
nodes.description: Command emergency shutdown valves to close, halting pipeline flow and causing pressure surges

nodes.title: Override Compressor Station Setpoints
nodes.description: Alter gas compressor settings to create overpressure conditions in pipeline segments

nodes.title: Disable Leak Detection System
nodes.description: Blind pipeline leak detection to prevent early warning of pressure anomalies

nodes.title: Spoof Flow Meter Readings
nodes.description: Inject false flow meter data so the computational pipeline model does not detect leaks
